title: BitForge
description: Lag? Crashes? Compatibility chaos? BitForge is your all-in-one performance and stability overhaul. Engineered to clean up the mess mods leave behind and supercharge your gameplay. Smooth frames, fast loads, zero nonsense.
body:
🔥 What is BitForge?
BitForge is a performance-boosted, exploration-packed Minecraft modpack built to run everywhere—from low-end laptops to VR headsets, even PojavLauncher on mobile. It cranks up the world generation, realism, and optimization so hard, you'll forget it's still Minecraft. Once you start playing, you won't want to stop.

Whether you're hunting ancient secrets in the Deeper Darker, roaming the vast biomes of Terralith, or just vibing with gorgeous shaders like Complementary or Rethinking Voxels, BitForge is tuned for smooth gameplay and immersive vibes.

💡 Why Did I Make This?
Because I love making Minecraft better. Simple. I wanted to build something fun for everyone—no matter what device you're on. Minecraft is already the best block game out there, so I forged this pack to push it even further.

🧱 What’s Inside?
⚙️ Performance mods for better FPS on all devices

🌍 Massive exploration mods like Terralith & Deeper Darker

🎮 VR-ready & Pojav-compatible

🌈 Shader support from lightweight to ultra (you choose!)

📦 ...and way more surprises

👍 Like it?
If this pack makes your world feel cooler, hit that like & download button. [Support](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bitforge/)
